gtmqol.multiblock.dimensionally_transcen: Can run fusion recipes of any tier, as long as you have enough energy inputs.
gtmqol.multiblock.pcb_factory_machine.er: Multiple modifiers found in the same machine, The machine will not run.
gtmqol.multiblock.pcb_factory_machine.no: No modifiers found in the machine, recipes will not be modified.
gtmqol.machine.pcb_factory.tooltip.0: Recipes in this machine can be modified by putting nanites in input buses in this machine
gtmqol.machine.pcb_factory.tooltip.1: The duration and output multipliers can be found in the tooltip of the nanites
gtmqol.machine.pcb_factory.tooltip.2: Effects are applied multiplicatively, Both duration and output multipliers are capped at 65536x
gtmqol.item.sticky_card.tooltip.0: Prevents partitioned content from being inserted into other storage locations with equal or lower priority if it can't be inserted into the storage location with the Sticky Card.
gtmqol.item.sticky_card.tooltip.1: Works similarly to Sticky Card in GTNH, however you MUST partition the inputs in the storage location (blacklist or whitelist).
gtmqol.item.sticky_card.tooltip.2: The only difference is the storage system still checks storage in priority order, and will only stop inserting when a storage bus has a Sticky Card, the content is partitioned there, no higher priority storage can accept it, and the content cannot be stored in that location.
gtmqol.item.sticky_card.tooltip.3: Specifically, if multiple storage locations have the same priority, storage locations with a Sticky Card are checked first.
